title: 🧰 Loadout Guide (Weapons + Spells)
footer: Veyra • Use /loadout to equip • Tip: Good loadout = easier wins

pages.title: 🧰 What is a Loadout?
pages.description:
Your **Loadout** is what you bring into battle: a **Weapon** + a **Spell**.

Weapons affect your stats and give passives. Spells are your high-impact abilities that cost Mana.

If you feel like you’re losing even when you ""play well"", 90% of the time your loadout is the problem.

fields.name: Equip / Change Loadout
fields.value:
Use: `/loadout`

This opens an interactive UI with dropdowns to select your weapon and spell.

fields.name: How loadout affects battles
fields.value:
• modifies your stats (HP/Attack/Defense/Speed/Mana)
• unlocks weapon passives
• determines what your **Cast** stance does

You can’t win matchups by ""skill"" alone if your loadout has no win-condition.

fields.name: Core Battle Reminder
fields.value:
Stances: ⚔️ Attack • 🛡️ Block • 🔁 Counter • 💧 Recover • 🔮 Cast

Your weapon + spell mainly affects **Attack** and **Cast**, and how safe Recover/Defense is for you.

pages.title: 🗡️ Weapons Overview
pages.description: Weapons give **stat bonuses** and sometimes special passives. Pick a weapon based on the kind of fight you want: scaling damage, tanking, frost burst, status control, etc.

fields.name: Available Weapons
fields.value:
• Training Blade
• The Moon Slasher
• Dark Blade
• Elephant Hammer
• Eternal Tome
• Veyra’s Grimoire ⭐
• Bardok’s Claymore ⭐

fields.name: How to choose
fields.value:
• Want consistent wins? → **Training Blade / Fireball**
• Want burst win-condition? → **Moon Slasher / Frostbite**
• Want to stall & outlast? → **Elephant Hammer / Erdtree Blessing**
• Want chaos + status? → **Eternal Tome / Nightfall**

pages.title: 🗡️ Training Blade
pages.description:
**Type:** Scaling DPS weapon

Training Blade is the cleanest, most reliable weapon for beginners and tryhards. It makes Attack stronger the longer the fight goes.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+5**
• HP Bonus: +0
• Defense Bonus: +0
• Speed Bonus: +0
• Mana Bonus: +0

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On Attack success:** your Attack increases by **+1** (stacking).

If you keep landing hits, you eventually become a problem.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Fireball** (simple burst)
• **Veil of Darkness** (survive while scaling)

Playstyle: Attack pressure + occasional Block/Counter so you don’t get punished.

pages.title: 🌙 The Moon Slasher
pages.description:
**Type:** Frost builder / win-condition

Moon Slasher is designed around stacking **Frost** and threatening a massive burst once stacks get high.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+2**
• HP Bonus: **+5**
• Defense Bonus: **+8**
• Speed Bonus: **+3**
• Mana Bonus: **+1**

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On Attack success:** target gains **+4 Frost**.

This pairs insanely well with Frostbite spell.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Frostbite** (frost burst setup)

Playstyle: stay alive and build stacks. When Frost gets scary, enemy starts playing defensive = you control tempo.

pages.title: 🕳️ Dark Blade
pages.description:
**Type:** Anti-heal / aggression

Dark Blade is the "no fun allowed" weapon. It disables healing for **both** fighters once you land a hit.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+8**
• HP Bonus: +0
• Defense Bonus: +0
• Speed Bonus: +0
• Mana Bonus: +0

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On Attack success:** healing is disabled for **both players** for the rest of the game.

This hard-counters sustain builds.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Fireball** (finish fast)
• **Heavyshot** (HP control)

Playstyle: land a hit early → deny Recover value → force fight to end quickly.

pages.title: 🐘 Elephant Hammer
pages.description:
**Type:** Tank / stall

Elephant Hammer makes you bulky and enables a special Block behavior.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+3**
• HP Bonus: **+10**
• Defense Bonus: **+15**
• Speed Bonus: **-1**
• Mana Bonus: +0

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On Block:** triggers **Full Block**(Block negates 100% damage instead of usual 70%).

This is the best weapon for players who like outlasting opponents.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Erdtree Blessing** (heal + tank = nightmare)
• **Veil of Darkness** (even harder to damage)

Playstyle: deny damage, force opponent to overcommit, then punish.

pages.title: 📜 Eternal Tome
pages.description:
**Type:** Status amplifier

Eternal Tome is for effect-based gameplay. Your spells become much more oppressive.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+3**
• HP Bonus: +0
• Defense Bonus: +0
• Speed Bonus: +0
• Mana Bonus: **+5**

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On successful spell cast:** all active status effects on target get **+3 rounds duration**.

This turns short effects into long-term suffering.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Nightfall** (extended stat drain)
• **Veil of Darkness** (longer protection)
• **Erdtree Blessing** (longer healing)

Playstyle: apply effect once → maintain tempo while enemy slowly collapses.

pages.title: 🧿 Veyra’s Grimoire ⭐
pages.description:
**Type:** Spell synergy / high risk

Veyra’s Grimoire is for casters who want to keep casting forever… at a cost.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+2**
• HP Bonus: +0
• Defense Bonus: +0
• Speed Bonus: +0
• Mana Bonus: **+2**

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On successful spell cast:**
• you gain **+4 Mana**
• you lose **-5 HP**

Meaning: your spells become sustainable, but you’re burning yourself alive.

fields.name: Best With
fields.value:
• **Nightfall** (control)
• **Veil of Darkness** (protect your HP while self-draining)

Playstyle: cast often, but manage HP carefully.

pages.title: 🪓 Bardok’s Claymore ⭐
pages.description:
**Type:** Brutal lifesteal / glass cannon

Bardok’s Claymore is a cursed greatsword that feeds on violence. It only reveals its true power in Bardok’s hands.

fields.name: Stat Bonuses
fields.value:
• Attack Bonus: **+10**
• HP Bonus: +0
• Defense Bonus: **-10**
• Speed Bonus: **-2**
• Mana Bonus: +0

fields.name: Passive
fields.value:
✅ **On Attack success (Bardok only):** Bardok heals **4 HP**.

If a player equips this weapon, the blade refuses to awaken.

fields.name: Playstyle
fields.value: All-in aggression. Bardok trades survivability for raw damage and lifesteal.

pages.title: 🔮 Spells Overview
pages.description:
Spells are used with the **Cast** stance and cost Mana.
If you cast without thinking, you’ll run out of mana and become a sitting duck.

fields.name: Available Spells
fields.value:
• Fireball
• Nightfall
• Heavyshot
• Erdtree Blessing
• Frostbite
• Veil of Darkness ⭐
• Earthquake

fields.name: Casting Rule
fields.value:
You can only cast if you have enough Mana for that spell.
If you don’t, your Cast fails and you loose health.

pages.title: 🔥 Fireball
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 15

Fireball is pure damage. No tricks. No status. Just "you lose HP".

fields.name: Effect
fields.value: Deals **16 damage** to the enemy.

fields.name: When to use
fields.value:
• punish defensive turns
• finish low HP enemies
• force pressure when you’re ahead

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: Training Blade, Dark Blade

pages.title: 🌑 Nightfall
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 9

Nightfall is a control spell. It weakens the enemy over time.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
Applies **Nightfall** for **5 rounds**:
Each round, a **random stat** is chosen and reduced by set amount 
 Hp -3, Attack -1, Speed -1, Mana -2, Defense -5

fields.name: How to play it
fields.value: Once Nightfall is active, play slower. The opponent will get weaker automatically, so you don’t need to force risky attacks.

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: Eternal Tome, Veyra’s Grimoire

pages.title: 🎯 Heavyshot
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 16

Heavyshot is a swing spell. It sets the enemy’s HP to your current HP.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
Sets target HP = caster HP.

If you have low HP, it’s basically a nuke. If you’re high… it’s pointless?

fields.name: Best timing
fields.value: If you’re losing HP races, make your opponent loose it as well.

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: Dark Blade (forces no-heal HP race), Elephant Hammer

pages.title: 🌳 Erdtree Blessing
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 14

Sustain spell. If your opponent can’t stop you from healing, you become extremely hard to kill.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
Applies **Large Heal** for **4 rounds**:
Each round, you heal **4 HP**.

fields.name: How to play it
fields.value: Cast early in long fights. Once healing starts ticking, you can afford more defensive turns to waste enemy mana.

fields.name: Counters
fields.value: Dark Blade (healing disabled), heavy burst pressure

pages.title: ❄️ Frostbite
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 6

Frostbite accelerates Frost win-condition: fast stacks with a small Speed penalty.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
• target gains **+5 Frost**
• target loses **-1 Speed**

fields.name: Why it’s scary
fields.value:
At **10 Frost**, the target takes **50% of their current HP** as damage.

So this spell can force panic plays and defensive spam.

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: The Moon Slasher

pages.title: 🌫️ Veil of Darkness ⭐
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 10

Defensive spell that makes physical attacks much weaker.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
Applies **Veil of Darkness** for **4 rounds**:
Incoming **Attack** damage reduced by **60%**.

fields.name: How to use
fields.value: Cast when you expect Attack-heavy gameplay. It forces the enemy to rely on spells or prediction instead of raw DPS.

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: Elephant Hammer, Training Blade, Veyra’s Grimoire

pages.title: 🌍 Earthquake ⭐
pages.description:
**Mana Cost:** 13

Earthquake is a control spell that shatters defenses and slows the enemy.

fields.name: Effect
fields.value:
• Deals **5 damage**
• Sets target **Defense to 0**
• Reduces target **Speed by 3**

fields.name: How to use
fields.value: Cast early to cripple tanky opponents.

fields.name: Pairs Well With
fields.value: Bardok’s Claymore, Dark Blade

pages.title: 🏆 Loadout Tips (Noob → Menace)
pages.description: A few player-facing fundamentals that will instantly improve your winrate:

fields.name: 1) Pick a win condition
fields.value:
Don’t just equip random stuff. Decide how you want to win:
• scale Attack (Training Blade)
• stack Frost (Moon Slasher + Frostbite)
• outheal/outtank (Elephant Hammer + Erdtree)
• drain stats (Nightfall + Eternal Tome)

fields.name: 2) Mana is a resource
fields.value: If you spam Cast early, you’ll run out and lose. Save mana for **high-value moments**.

fields.name: 3) Don’t counter the wrong thing
fields.value: Counter is strongest when the enemy is predictable. If you’re guessing randomly, you’re gambling (and not even earning gold for it).

fields.name: 4) Your gear changes your rhythm
fields.value:
Fast weapons win speed wars. Tank weapons win long wars.
If you fight against your weapon’s strength, you’re nerfing yourself.
